conservative.name: Flying Debris
conservative.requirements:
Used by: Giants
Target within long range, heavy stones or debris to hurl

success.description: The giant hurls some enormous chunk of wood, stone, or metal through the air. The attack inflicts normal damage, using the giant's Strength (instead of Agility) to calculate damage
As above, and strikes a secondary target within close range of the primary target

boon.description: All targets suffer the Staggered condition for 2 rounds

chaosStar.description: All targeted characters may immediately remove one recharge token from each of their Active Defense action cards, even if this attack fails

sigmarsComet.description: Another target within close range of the primary target is struck

reckless.name: Flying Debris
reckless.requirements: Target within long range. You use a piece of debris or massive stone as a weapon in this attack; its statistics are included in the effects

success.description: You hurl an enormous chunk of wood, stone, or metal through the air. The attack hits for Strength + 5 damage
As above, and the attack hits all other characters in the same engagement as the target for Strength + 3 damage

boon.description: All targets suffer the Staggered condition for 2 rounds

chaosStar.description: All characters in the target engagement may perform a free manoeuvre (probably run for cover!)
